subject: Energy Spinner, a mechanical spinning top device with glowing blue energy on a dark background
description: A metallic spinning top or gyroscope-like device sits at center, emitting a bright blue glowing energy from its core. The object appears mechanical and polished with rings and a pointed base. The background is dark and indistinct, making the blue glow the dominant visual element. The mood is technological and kinetic.
foreground: metallic spinning device with blue glowing energy
